products.name: QS Pedestrian Gate
products.description: Single-leaf aluminium pedestrian gate compatible with QSHS, VS, XPL and BAYG fence systems. Screw-fixed slat blades with 65mm QSG top/bottom rails and QSG 50x50 gate side frames.
